detectvideo.title: AI Video Detector Online | Free Deepfake Checker Tool
detectvideo.snippet: DetectVideo AI supports uploaded video files and many common video links. You can use it as a YouTube AI detector, a checker for YouTube Shorts, and a practical tool for suspicious videos from social platforms such as Instagram Reels, TikTok, Vimeo, X/Twitter, and Facebook.

video authenticity checker.title: Check If a Video Is Real — Free Video Authenticity Checker
video authenticity checker.snippet: Verify if a video is real or fake before sharing. TrueSight's free video authenticity checker analyzes frames to detect deepfakes and AI-generated content.

video content detection api.title: Video Intelligence API documentation - Google Cloud
video content detection api.snippet: Analyze video content to detect entities (such as humans, animals, objects, and landmarks), flag adult content , and mark scene changes.
